<div class="lecture-text-container">
<p></p><h1><strong>UPDATE</strong></h1><p>Can I tell you what happened to Beki since we did "The Drill Down Method" together a year ago to find her message?</p><p>Well.</p><p>First, she started doing weekly face to cam videos revealing personally lived, hard truths about the modeling industry.</p><p>As she puts it in her Instagram bio (at the time I'm writing this): <a href="https://www.instagram.com/rexadams_/" target="_blank">"Body positivity and mental health without the sugar coating 🖤"</a> ("real, real")</p><p>And don't think this is easy for her because she's "pretty". She has to battle daily with one of the biggest creativity killers there is:</p><p>Perfectionism</p><p>But she fought. And she's won often lately.</p><p>And this religious weekly effort very quickly led to her getting a national campaign with <a href="https://www.missguidedus.com/" target="_blank">MISSGUIDED</a>. They picked her out of hundreds of girls specifically because of how outspoken she was online.</p><p>And then more opportunities starting opening up. Like acting.</p><p>This is just the beginning for her.</p><p>The acceleration of her career happened because she put 3 days aside to ask herself the deep questions.</p><p>Instead of hiding behind weekend brunches, mainstream nightlife, or binge-watching Netflix . </p><p>This kind of soul searching is what you need sometimes to wake up your sleeping giant potential.</p><p>Find your message</p><p><a href="https://www.instagram.com/p/B9q5dJ9nC7m/" target="_blank"><img data-imageloader="" data-imageloader-src="https://uploads.teachablecdn.com/attachments/GxAAP42ESYaSFCLnEH5Q_8a615eafe1eb3a84e8df2b069b107de2.png" src="https://uploads.teachablecdn.com/attachments/GxAAP42ESYaSFCLnEH5Q_8a615eafe1eb3a84e8df2b069b107de2.png" data-imageloader-current-size="" class="is-loaded"></a></p><p>There are people in the hospital wishing they had the opportunity you have right now.</p><p>Don't waste it.</p><p></p>
</div>
